turns.agentText:
Found the Luminary build in AxiForge — let me pull it up.

Now let me look up the trait names and gear details to build an accurate guide.

Now let me look up the trait names.

Let me also look up the key skill descriptions.

I now have all the data I need. Here is a fully grounded guide based on the exact build in AxiForge.

---

# Luminary Guardian — WvW Zerg Support Guide

The Luminary is a **boon support Guardian** that runs in your subgroup as a stability engine, condition cleanser, Aegis applicator, and Quickness/Fury source — all wrapped in enough Concentration to make its boons meaningful. It sits at the crossroads of support and damage, dipping into respectable spike through [[trait:Shattered Aegis]] and spear.

---

## Gear at a Glance

| Piece | Stat |
|---|---|
| Armor (6 pieces) | Diviner's (Power / Precision / Ferocity / Concentration) |
| Jewelry (rings, accessories) | Wanderer's (Power / Vitality / Toughness / Concentration) |
| Amulet + Back | Commander's (Power / Precision / Toughness / Concentration) |
| Weapons | Wanderer's |
| Rune (6x) | [[item:Superior Rune of Fireworks]] (+175 Power, +25% Boon Duration) |
| Infusions (18x) | [[item:Concentration WvW Infusion]] (+5 Concentration each = +90 total, −1% damage from guards) |
| Food | Spiced Peppercorn Cheesecake (ascended feast) |
| Utility | [[item:Magnanimous Maintenance Oil]] (Concentration = 3% of Vitality + 3% of Toughness) |
| Relic | Relic of the Brawler |

**Why this stat mix?** Diviner's powers up your damage and crits while giving Concentration; Wanderer's on jewelry and weapons gives survivability (Vitality + Toughness) which the Maintenance Oil then converts *back into Concentration* — so your durability directly increases your boon uptime. The Fireworks rune and infusion stack push boon duration even further.

---

## Weapons

| Set | Weapons | Sigils |
|---|---|---|
| 1 | Spear | [[item:Superior Sigil of Fire]] + [[item:Superior Sigil of Accuracy]] |
| 2 | Mace / Shield | [[item:Superior Sigil of Accuracy]] + [[item:Superior Sigil of Bloodlust]] |

The **spear** is your primary weapon — it is a "radiant weapon" for the Luminary spec, meaning equipping it procs [[trait:Illuminating Inspiration]] and cuts virtue cooldowns. The **mace/shield** is your defensive set for tight spots and blocks. Bloodlust stacks on kills; in a WvW zerg you'll cap 25 stacks (250 bonus Power) within the first few engagements — never lose them.

---

## Traits Explained

### Zeal
- [[trait:Fiery Wrath]] — +5% strike damage to burning foes. Synergizes with Fire sigil procs.
- [[trait:Zealous Blade]] — +120 Power baseline. Simple raw stat.
- [[trait:Shattered Aegis]] — When aegis *you applied* blocks an attack, it explodes for AoE damage (240 radius). Since you're constantly applying Aegis to your subgroup via [[skill:"Advance!"]] and F3 passive, this fires passively and often.

### Virtues
- [[trait:Unscathed Contender]] — +7% strike damage while you have Aegis, and +7% while above 90% HP. Aegis is nearly permanent on you through [[skill:"Advance!"]] and F3 passive — treat this as a persistent damage buff.
- [[trait:Absolute Resolve]] — Activating Virtue of Resolve (F2) removes **3 conditions** from 5 nearby allies in a 600 range radius. This is your burst cleanse panic button.
- [[trait:Indomitable Courage]] — Activating Virtue of Courage (F3) grants **3 stacks of Stability (4s)** to 5 nearby allies in 600 range and breaks your stun. F3's passive also grants Aegis to nearby allies every 30 seconds automatically.

### Luminary (Elite Spec)
- [[trait:Shimmering Stances]] — Every time you use a Stance, it grants **3s Protection** to affected allies and **3s Blind** to enemies. Two of your skills are stances, and your heal is a stance, so this fires very frequently.
- [[trait:Purging Light]] — Using your heal skill gives you Light Aura and removes **1 condition** from 5 nearby allies (300 range). Light Aura also reduces incoming condition damage by 10%.
- [[trait:Illuminating Inspiration]] — Equipping a radiant weapon (your spear) reduces virtue cooldowns: **4s off F1, 3s off F2, 2s off F3**. Every weapon swap to spear shaves time off your virtues. This is the core spec mechanic — see rotation below.

---

## Skills Explained

| Skill | Type | What it Does |
|---|---|---|
| [[skill:Resolute Stance]] | Heal / Stance (30s) | Heals you for ~6,550, heals 5 allies for ~3,350, removes **3 conditions** from allies in 360 range. With [[trait:Shimmering Stances]]: also grants 3s Protection to allies and Blinds nearby enemies. |
| [[skill:"Advance!"]] | Shout (2 charges, 24s each) | Grants **Aegis + Swiftness** (20s) to 5 allies in 600 range. 2 charges — very spammable. |
| [[skill:Valorous Stance]] | Stance (25s) | Grants **5 stacks of Stability (4s) + Protection** to 5 allies in 300 range. While active, heals allies whenever you grant them boons. With [[trait:Shimmering Stances]]: Protection extends to 7s and Blinds enemies. |
| [[skill:"Stand Your Ground!"]] | Shout (24s) | **Stun break.** Grants **5 stacks of Stability (6s) + Resolution (5s)** to 5 allies in 600 range. |
| [[skill:"Feel My Wrath!"]] | Elite Shout (30s) | Grants **Quickness (3s) + Fury (10s) + Superspeed (4s)** to 5 allies in 600 range. |

---

## Virtues (F-Skills)

- **F1 (Virtue of Justice)** — Passive: periodically burns nearby enemies. Active: applies burning to all attacks briefly.
- **F2 (Virtue of Resolve)** — With [[trait:Absolute Resolve]]: removes **3 conditions** from 5 allies in 600 range. Passive regen is also 25% stronger. Use this as a burst cleanse when your subgroup is being bombed with conditions.
- **F3 (Virtue of Courage)** — With [[trait:Indomitable Courage]]: grants **3x Stability (4s)** + stun break to 5 allies in 600 range. Passive Aegis application every 30s automatically.

---

## The Core Mechanic: Radiant Weapon Swapping

[[trait:Illuminating Inspiration]] is the heartbeat of this build. Every time you swap **to your spear** (set 1), it reduces all three virtue cooldowns (4s/3s/2s). This means:

1. **Engage on spear** → virtues immediately get a CD cut
2. **Dump support cooldowns** (Valorous Stance → Stand Your Ground! → virtue F3)
3. **Weapon swap to mace/shield** if you need to block or fight in melee
4. **Swap back to spear** when ready → virtues get another cut, they may be ready again
5. **Repeat**

The faster your virtues come back, the more Stability and condition cleanse you pump into your subgroup. Don't idle on one weapon set.

---

## Priority Order in a Fight

Treat this as a rough priority — react to what your subgroup needs:

1. **Stability first.** Rotate [[skill:Valorous Stance]] → [[skill:"Stand Your Ground!"]] → F3 actively to keep stacks up. In a zerg push, stability loss means your party gets CC'd and dies in the blob. These three sources give you overlapping windows.
2. **Swap to spear** whenever you can to trim virtue CDs.
3. **Aegis cycling.** [[skill:"Advance!"]] has 2 charges on ~24s each — use them on CD, don't hoard. Every aegis you put on someone could proc [[trait:Shattered Aegis]] for free AoE damage, and it keeps [[trait:Unscathed Contender]] active on you.
4. **Quickness on CD.** [[skill:"Feel My Wrath!"]] every 30 seconds — this is a squad-accelerant, don't hold it.
5. **Cleanse reactively.** F2 and [[skill:Resolute Stance]] are your big cleanse tools. Save them for when you see condition bombs landing, not as a preemptive spend.
6. **Contribute damage.** Spear auto-attacks, Sigil of Fire procs on crits, and [[trait:Shattered Aegis]] explosions add up passively — you're not a pure healer. Stay in the fight.

---

## Positioning

- **300 range matters.** [[skill:Valorous Stance]] and [[trait:Purging Light]] both cap at 300 range. You need to be within ~300 units of the 4 players you're supporting when you pop stances. Don't let the blob push you 600+ away from your subgroup.
- **600 range is your safety net.** Both shouts and your elite reach 600 — you have a little more room for those.
- **Stay with the melee train.** This comp is melee-driven. The Luminary supports a melee subgroup, not a ranged backline — plant your feet in the push and cycle stabilities to keep the group on their feet.

---

## Key Combos

- **Stance → boon dump:** Pop [[skill:Valorous Stance]] (which enters the healing-on-boon mode), then immediately stack other boons on your subgroup — the Valorous Stance passive heals allies for every boon you grant while it's active.
- **Cleanse chain:** [[skill:Resolute Stance]] (3 conditions, 360 range) → [[trait:Purging Light]] procs Light Aura (1 more condition) → F2 with [[trait:Absolute Resolve]] (3 conditions, 600 range). That's 7 conditions stripped in a short window if you layer them.
- **Aegis burst:** Spam both charges of [[skill:"Advance!"]] back-to-back → every blocked hit on every target in your subgroup fires [[trait:Shattered Aegis]] AoE → free multi-hit AoE damage from your whole party blocking.

---

## What You Are NOT

- **Not a healer.** Your healing is incidental — raw heal numbers are moderate, and the Magnanimous Oil and Diviner's stats don't stack Healing Power. Your value is boons and cleanse.
- **Not a pure DPS.** You contribute damage, but you're slotted as support. Never sacrifice a Stability rotation to land more spear hits.
- **Not a Firebrand.** The Luminary is a second support source in the subgroup — you're sharing the load with a Troubadour or Druid, not replacing them. Coordinate who covers what.
